pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates FlightSystem project with hardcoded Java source files

privileged_info_summary: The FlightSystem project is a synthetic Java project created at /home/ga/Documents/FlightSystem with JavaSE-17 configuration. The BookingService class contains a createBooking method with 8 parameters: passengerId, flightNumber, flightDate (non-seat), and seatRow, seatLetter, window, aisle, exitRow (seat-related). The refactoring task requires extracting the 5 seat-related parameters into a new SeatDetails class in the com.flysky.service package using Eclipse's Introduce Parameter Object tool, while keeping the 3 non-seat parameters in the original method signature.
